text: v0.3 sparse and linear-operator phase complete: LinearOperator/DoubleLinearOperator, COO builder and duplicate policies, platform-backed CSR/CSC, structured sparse formats, sparse operations, Matrix Market string IO, solver/preconditioner APIs, CG, BiCGSTAB, restarted GMRES, LSQR-style least-squares candidate, and dense-sparse laws. Evidence: sbt testAll, sbt benchCompile, sbt benchSmokeJS.
